case_title: YESENIA PEREZ BENITEZ VS. JAIME BARELLA PACHECO

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENITEZ, YESENIA PEREZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACHECO, JAIME BARELLA , AN INDIVIDUAL $1,916.95 PRINCIPAL, $13.76 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,110.71, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENITEZ, YESENIA PEREZ AS TO DEFENDANT PACHECO, JAIME BARELLA , AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
